workplace.title: Sharper mornings, cleaner focus, no heavy aftertaste.
workplace.description: Built for long office hours and early starts, Aqina delivers a brighter, soup-like profile with fast absorption so your first drink supports clarity instead of feeling medicinal.
workplace.pointOne: Light golden taste that is easy to drink daily
workplace.pointTwo: Small-molecule nutrition for quick morning recovery
workplace.pointThree: Fits executives, founders, and high-output teams

maternity.title: Gentle enough for sensitive days, rich enough for deep nourishment.
maternity.description: Designed for pregnancy and postpartum recovery, the formula keeps the aroma clean and the texture light while still delivering concentrated amino acids for everyday restoration.
maternity.pointOne: Smoother aroma for sensitive pregnancy stages
maternity.pointThree: A refined ritual for postpartum rebuilding

recovery.title: A concentrated daily backup when the body needs rebuilding.
recovery.description: When appetite is low and recovery demands are high, the goal is purity and absorption. Aqina keeps the serving compact, precise, and easier for daily intake during fragile periods.
recovery.pointOne: Compact serving for low-appetite recovery periods
recovery.pointTwo: Made for surgical recovery and elderly care routines
recovery.pointThree: Clean ingredient story for family confidence

halal.title: Global trust marks, premium process, and a cleaner ingredient story.
halal.description: Halal confidence, disciplined production, and clear sourcing make Aqina easier to recommend to families who want premium nourishment without compromise.
halal.pointOne: Halal-friendly positioning for broader household trust
halal.pointTwo: Premium process story suitable for gifting and sharing
halal.pointThree: Supports modern wellness without changing routines

ugcReviews.title: Different people, same priority: easy taste, easy absorption, quick recovery feel.

items.name: Mrs. Lim
items.content: After settling the kids at night, I warm one pouch. It tastes clean like light soup, and I wake up steadier the next morning.

items.name: Jia En
items.content: During revision weeks, I need something simple before class. This is easy to drink warm and helps me stay more focused through morning lessons.

items.name: Alicia
items.content: I heat one while preparing breakfast, so the routine is easy to keep. No oily after-feel, and I can head to work feeling lighter.

items.name: Min Yi
items.content: Over the last two months, I was juggling multiple launches at once and constantly jumping between meetings and docs. By mid-afternoon, I used to crash and rely on coffee just to push through. I switched to one warm pouch in the afternoon, and it felt like clear chicken soup with no oily heaviness. After a week, the biggest difference was staying mentally sharper in late meetings and still having energy when I got home.

items.name: Li Tong
items.content: During exam season, my days were packed with classes, tuition, and late-night revision, and mornings felt especially heavy. I started taking one warm pouch before study sessions because it is easy to drink and does not upset my stomach. After a week, I noticed fewer afternoon energy dips and better focus during long review blocks. What matters most is that I can actually keep this routine daily without forcing it.

items.name: Emma
items.content: I teach multiple classes a day, and the hardest part used to be the late-afternoon drop in stamina. I now warm one pouch between classes because it is gentle, clean-tasting, and never feels too heavy before the next session. After a few days, I could feel less end-of-day fatigue and a smoother start the following morning. For coaches, that kind of steady recovery is far more useful than short bursts of energy.

items.name: Mr. Tan
items.content: Business travel and late dinners used to drain me fast. With this daily routine, I feel less of that afternoon crash and can keep my pace better.

items.name: Aishah
items.content: Rasa dia ringan dan senang minum setiap pagi. Lepas seminggu, badan rasa lebih bertenaga untuk urus anak dan kerja rumah.

items.name: Yi Xuan
items.content: On report weeks, heavy food slows me down. This warm serving is simple, clean in taste, and easy to keep as part of my campus routine.

items.name: Rahul
items.content: Morning market sessions start early, so convenience matters. One pouch before work gives me a smoother start without feeling overly full.

items.name: Riya
items.content: Between meetings and school runs, I need something quick and gentle. This has become my easiest daily routine because it is warm and light.

items.name: Hakim
items.content: Lepas larian petang, saya minum panas-panas. Badan rasa cepat lega dan esok pagi bangun pun lebih ringan.

items.name: Mei Qi
items.content: My training days are packed, so I value routines that are easy to repeat. This is clean tasting and sits comfortably even between sessions.

items.name: Auntie Lim
items.content: My appetite is small and my stomach is sensitive. This feels like light soup and is easy for me to take every day.

items.name: Pak Rahman
items.content: Saya mula kerja sangat awal setiap hari. Minuman ini senang disediakan dan bantu saya kekal bertenaga sampai tengah hari.

storyOne.title: Why are our chickens raised with pineapple enzymes?
storyOne.body: We believe the best nourishment should work with the body. Natural pineapple enzymes act like a gentle pre-digestion step, breaking dense proteins into finer nutrients. That means when you or your family drinks Aqina, the stomach does less heavy work and the body receives support faster.

storyTwo.title: Do not let “tonic” become extra burden.
storyTwo.body: Traditional boiled chicken soup often comes with heavy oils and hard-to-digest residue. During fatigue and recovery, the body needs clean support, not digestive pressure. Aqina goes through deep oil-removal extraction and keeps only clear, golden essence for easier intake.

emotional.title: The highest level of care is what the body can truly accept.
emotional.body: Whether you are caring for yourself after long days or supporting someone in recovery, the best choice is not simply the most expensive one. It is the one the body can absorb consistently. A warm serving of Aqina becomes a quiet way to say: stay well, do not push too hard.

valueCta.title: Every drop is worth feeling with intention.
valueCta.body: Non-compromised purity, built to provide steady support at critical moments.
valueCta.button: Choose Your Daily / Intensive Pure Care Plan
